title: General Solar Position Calculations

license.notes: NOAA-created government information is generally public domain. Credit NOAA and do not imply endorsement.

rights.notes: The implementation independently encodes the published equations and identifies NOAA as the source.

rights_review.evidence: NOAA formula PDF and NOAA public-domain policy inspected.

quality.notes: Official approximate equation-of-time and true-solar-time equations. The result is an engineering approximation, not an ephemeris-grade SPA implementation.

notes: Used only to transform a validated civil clock reading into an optional apparent-solar calculation clock. The physical UTC instant remains unchanged.
